video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Ren Mistfell (feminine, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash marks on gloves) and Ren Brightford (androgynous, rolled-sleeve apron, brass tool belt, ash marks on gloves); Ren Mistfell steadies a large shield on the wooden workbench while Ren Brightford carefully guides a safe repair tool along the metal surface, cooperative hands, warm forge light, cozy workshop atmosphere, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark, cinematic lighting.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot; after ten seconds Ren Brightford taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Ren Mistfell continues to hold the shield steady, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, consistent warm forge lighting, cozy Japanese fantasy workshop, no text, no watermark, high quality anime style.
video_job.safety_notes: The scene depicts professional, non-sexual cooperation between two crafters in a workshop setting. All actions are safe and focused on task completion.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Both crafters are present in the tavern corner and can collaborate to address the forge bottleneck mentioned in the current world events.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborated on forge repairs to alleviate the bottleneck.
Appreciated the professional assistance and shared workload.
